title: Solar Apocalypse Modpack
description: A solar Apocalypse modpack I made for a video, feel free to edit it.
body:
# A solar Apocalyspe Modpack I made for a video;
 (https://youtu.be/JgIRxsoj-f8)
## If you want a fun and challenging modpack to play, give this one a try! I recommend building a bunker underground so you don't get incinerated by the sun.
## It adds:
- Some Ambient sounds
- Some Shaders (optional)
- Sleeping bags (Comforts)
- Texture connecting mod (Continuity)
- A Mod that allows you to sleep through the day (Day Dream)
- Guard Villagers (Guard Villagers)
- Guns (Happiness (is a) Warm Gun)
- JEI, because its not a modpack without it (Just Enough Items)
- Dynamic Torch lights (LambDynamicLights)
- Different Zombie varients (More Default Zombies)
- Mouse Tweaks (Mouse Tweaks)
- Some Extra Player Animations (Not Enough Animations)
- Replay Mod, Because why not? (Replay Mod)
- Sodium, because its Fabric and no optifine :(
- The actual main mod, Solar Apocalyspe
- Sound Physics (Sound Physics Remastered)
- Villager Names, Because why not?
- Xaeros's Minimap and Xaero's World Map
- Better Dungeons (YUNG's Better Dungeons)
- A grave mod (You're in Grave Danger)
- A zoom mod (Zoomify)

There're some other API mods and other small mods too you can check out :)
